compositional_truth_check.status: Systemic Loss detected in P1; P2/P4 show signs of severe decline.

inventory_reconciliation.p1_string_of_nickels: Systemic Loss: No visible foliage, only soil.
inventory_reconciliation.p2_mexican_mint: Critical: Only a single, chlorotic, etiolated stem remains.
inventory_reconciliation.p3_pothos: Stable: Single leaf remains, rabbit anchor present.
inventory_reconciliation.p4_silver_guest: Systemic Loss: No distinct specimen identified in shared pot.

plant_audit.p1: Bare soil, no signs of life.
plant_audit.p2: Single thin, pale stem; high risk of total necrosis.
plant_audit.p3: One healthy-looking leaf, turgor appears maintained.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently dark and damp; potential overwatering risk.
biome_observations.debris: Eggshell fragments present in P2/P4; electronic component (header pin) introduced on desk surface.
biome_observations.fungal_presence: None visible, but soil saturation suggests high risk.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t4: Initial state shows P2/P4 with a single stem and eggshell mulch.
temporal_deltas.t3_to_t2: Introduction of a paper receipt/document near P1.
temporal_deltas.t2_to_t1: Lighting shift; significant darkening of the scene.
temporal_deltas.t1_to_current: Return to baseline lighting; electronic component (header pin) now visible on the desk surface.

visual_health_inference.p2: Terminal decline; photosynthetic capacity is minimal.

anomalies: Eggshell fragments used as soil amendment/mulch.
Electronic header pin (6-pin) placed on desk surface.
vision_report.narrative_description: The biome is in a state of advanced decline. P1 is effectively a dead pot. P2/P4 is struggling with a single, etiolated stem that lacks the vigor of a healthy Mexican Mint. P3 remains the only stable element, anchored by the rabbit figurine. The environment is cluttered with non-botanical debris (eggshells, electronics, paper), suggesting the desk is being used for multi-purpose activities that may be impacting the plants' micro-climate.
